# format: html5-dom-v2

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "Search"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="form" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="input" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="type" value="search"}, {ns=none prefix=- local="value" value="html parser"}]
        element ns=html local="button" attrs=[]
          "Search"
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="ol" attrs=[]
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="li" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="a" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="href" value="/docs/1"}]
            "Parser architecture"
          element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
            "Overview and design notes."
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="li" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="a" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="href" value="/docs/2"}]
            "Streaming behavior"
          element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
            "Chunking and UTF-8 boundaries."
        "\n"
      "\n"
